name: Visegrád Group
climate: Humid continental with warm summers and cold winters; transitional between maritime and continental influences

neighbors.name: European Union
neighbors.relevance: All V4 members are EU states; EU cohesion funds are a major economic driver

neighbors.name: Euro Area
neighbors.relevance: Slovakia is in the eurozone; others closely tied via supply chains to euro-denominated trade

neighbors.name: Ruhr Area
neighbors.relevance: German automotive OEMs source heavily from V4 factories; tightly coupled industrial corridor

neighbors.name: Baltic Sea Region
neighbors.relevance: Poland is a Baltic littoral state; Suwalki Gap is a shared NATO security concern

neighbors.name: Commonwealth of Independent States
neighbors.relevance: Eastern border with Ukraine and Belarus; historical energy dependency on Russian pipelines

neighbors.name: Black Sea Region
neighbors.relevance: Romania (EU neighbor) and Ukraine grain corridors feed through V4 logistics networks

links.description: All V4 states receive EU structural funds and participate in single market and Schengen
V4 automotive plants supply German OEMs; Poland and Czechia are top suppliers of auto components
V4 exports are predominantly euro-denominated; ECB policy affects V4 competitiveness
Joint NATO eastern flank defense; Poland leads Suwalki Gap security planning
Legacy pipeline infrastructure for Russian gas transits through V4 territory
Nordic firms invest heavily in V4 manufacturing and shared services sectors
